title: Pagination, Filtering, Links, Rate Limits, Versioning, and Resumable Work · Go Client Systems · Go Semantics Case: Query Filter Encoding
summary: A cluster inventory traversal follows cursors across thousands of resources, honors quotas, checkpoints progress, and resumes after cancellation. Planned artifact: Add and verify the http go query filter encoding increment in a Go 1.26 net/http resumable rate-aware API traversal. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Encode repeated parameters, arrays, dates, sorting, and filters according to the API contract without manual concatenation. Demonstrate the result through Go 1.26 net/http, net/url, context, io, crypto/tls, RoundTripper, and httptest evidence.

Traverse offset, page-number, cursor, and link pagination while detecting repeats, gaps, and termination. Demonstrate the result through Go 1.26 net/http, net/url, context, io, crypto/tls, RoundTripper, and httptest evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
